Footer.tagline: Strategic legal counsel for the modern world — delivered with precision, integrity, and results.

Home.heroSubtitle: A full-service legal consultancy serving corporations, institutions, and individuals across 12 practice areas throughout Indonesia and beyond.
Home.aboutTitle: A Modern Legal Partner for a Complex World
Home.aboutBody: JIN Legal Counsel was founded on the principle that exceptional legal counsel must be both strategically sharp and deeply human.
Home.aboutBody2: We bring together seven partners with deep expertise across corporate law, dispute resolution, emerging technologies, and specialized practice areas that define today's business landscape in Indonesia.

About.heroTitle: A Modern Legal Partner for a Complex World
About.heroSubtitle: Founded on the principle that exceptional legal counsel must be both strategically sharp and deeply human.
About.story1: JIN Legal Counsel was founded on a simple principle: exceptional legal counsel must be both strategically sharp and deeply human.
About.story2: We bring together seven partners with deep expertise across corporate law, dispute resolution, emerging technologies, and specialized practice areas that define today's business landscape in Indonesia. Our team has advised clients ranging from venture-backed startups to established multinationals.
About.story3: What sets us apart isn't just our technical expertise — it's our commitment to understanding each client's commercial reality before we ever open a statute book. We measure success by the outcomes we achieve, not the hours we bill.

Values.integrityBody: Every engagement guided by unwavering ethical standards and transparent communication.
Values.precisionBody: Legal strategies crafted with the thoroughness your interests demand.
Values.innovationBody: Combining deep expertise with forward-thinking approaches to emerging challenges.
Values.resultsBody: We measure success entirely by the outcomes we achieve for our clients.

Team.heroTitle: The Partners Behind JIN Legal Counsel
Team.heroSubtitle: Seven dedicated legal professionals delivering sharp, strategic counsel — from individuals and entrepreneurs to startups, institutions, and multinational corporations.

PracticeAreas.heroSubtitle: Twelve focused practice areas spanning corporate transactions, dispute resolution, regulatory advisory, energy and infrastructure, and specialized industry expertise across Indonesia.

Insights.heroSubtitle: Analysis, regulatory updates, and practical guidance from our practice areas across Indonesian law.
Insights.noInsights: No insights published yet — check back soon.

Careers.heroTitle: Build a Career at JIN Legal Counsel
Careers.heroSubtitle: We're looking for sharp, strategic, and curious legal professionals who want to do meaningful work.
Careers.noOpenings: No open positions at the moment — please check back soon.
Careers.submitApplicationDescription: Tell us about yourself and attach your CV. We review every application and respond within 1–2 weeks.
Careers.applicationFormDescription: Required fields marked with *. Your CV will be sent securely to our recruitment team. We respond within 1–2 weeks.
Careers.cvHelp: PDF, DOC, or DOCX. Max 10 MB.
Careers.coverLetterPlaceholder: Tell us why you're a great fit for this role…

Contact.heroSubtitle: Tell us about your matter — we typically respond within 1–2 business days.
Contact.name: Name *
Contact.subject: Subject
Contact.attachmentHelp: Optional. PDF, DOC, JPG, or PNG. Max 10 MB.

CtaBanner.title: Ready to work with us?
CtaBanner.subtitle: Schedule a consultation with one of our partners today.
